name: Swancor Holding Co., LTD.
summary: Swancor Holding Co., LTD. produces and sells chemical products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers vinyl ester and UP resins, including epoxy vinyl ester and unsaturated polyester resins, and epoxy adhesives; vinyl ester resins and epoxy systems for wind turbine blades; and epoxy composite resins, such as hand lay-up, filament winding, RTM/infusion, pultrusion, and solvent type epoxy resins, as well as carbon fiber and epoxy resins for prepreg. It also provides vinyl ester resins for marine applications; electrical insulating materials for use in large-scale casting application in the electronics and heavy electrical industries; and SMC/BMC resins and low profile additives. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Nantou City, Taiwan.
